# Project: ZiWei - The Forbidden City AI Guide

## Project Details

- Name: ZiWei - The Forbidden City AI Guide
- Type: React + Vite
- Features: Interactive Forbidden City AI guide with macOS-style desktop interface, draggable windows, glassmorphism, dark/light mode, bilingual support (English/Chinese)
- Dependencies: Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, react-draggable

## Implementation Summary

All components created and configured:

- App.jsx: Main application with window management logic
- Desktop.jsx: Fullscreen desktop with gradient background
- Dock.jsx: Animated bottom dock with app icons
- Window.jsx: Draggable, resizable windows with glassmorphism
- WindowControls.jsx: macOS-style window control buttons
- ThemeToggle.jsx: Dark/light mode toggle button

Project is ready to run with `npm run dev`
